name: SloWey
headerTaglineFour: Based in Ho Chi Minh City

projects.title: Katalon Support Assistant
projects.description: 24/7 AI-powered support chat for Katalon users, providing fast and contextual answers across product details, how-to guides, best practices, and troubleshooting.
highlights: Launched publicly at assistant.katalon.com as the first support touchpoint across the Katalon suite.
Integrated Claude 4.5 Haiku and web search to deliver faster answers and reduce support case volume by 30%.
Enabled seamless ticket creation with full conversation handoff to human support (Enterprise customers).

services.title: DevOps & Cloud
services.description: Designing and deploying scalable cloud-native infrastructure using AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, and Docker. Automating CI/CD pipelines for efficient delivery.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Building robust and high-performance backend systems with Java, .NET, Node.js, and Go. Specializing in microservices and event-driven architecture.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Delivering end-to-end web solutions using React, Next.js, and modern backend frameworks. Ensuring seamless user experience and system reliability.

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.description: Implementing AI/ML solutions for automation, data analysis, and intelligent features using Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV.

aboutpara: I'm Truong Le Vinh Phuc, a Technical Product Manager with a strong software engineering background. I lead cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end product solutions, turning technical complexity into measurable business value across SaaS, cloud-native systems, blockchain, and AI products.

resume.tagline: 👋  I'm a Technical Product Manager & Software Engineer.
resume.description: Technical Product Manager with proven experience leading cross-functional teams and delivering end-to-end product solutions. Strong background in software engineering, Agile execution, and translating technical complexity into business value.

experiences.position: AI Product Support Engineer at KATALON
bullets: Serve as Product Manager and Engineering Lead for the Katalon Support Assistant, owning roadmap, delivery, and technical execution.
Delivered automation and AI workflows that reduced support case volume by 30 percent.
Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Account teams to turn customer feedback into product improvements.
Handle complex customer inquiries, diagnose technical issues, and provide high-confidence solutions.
Maintain and expand the support knowledge base with high-value FAQs and support playbooks.
Continuously evaluate new features and technologies to improve support quality and product adoption.

experiences.position: Java Backend Developer Intern at FPT SOFTWARE
bullets: Supported CI/CD improvements and streamlined deployment workflows for a Spring Boot API system.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and improved system efficiency through performance-oriented fixes.
Worked in Agile/Scrum with Jira, contributing to sprint planning and delivery.

education.universityPara: Bachelor of Software Engineering. GPA: 8.72/10. Graduation thesis score: 9.5/10 (Cloud-Native Microservices E-Commerce Platform). Achieved 'Excellent' in Semester 1 and 2, Academic Year 2024-2025.

skillGroups.title: AI & Data Systems
